allow: Bash(python3 load_to_qdrant.py --sources naver daum krx --market KOSPI)
Bash(python3 -c "import qdrant_client; print\(qdrant_client.__version__\); from qdrant_client import QdrantClient; c = QdrantClient\('localhost', 6333\); print\(dir\(c\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "from qdrant_client import QdrantClient; c = QdrantClient\('localhost', 6333\); methods = [m for m in dir\(c\) if 'search' in m.lower\(\) or 'query' in m.lower\(\)]; print\(methods\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from qdrant_client import QdrantClient; c = QdrantClient\('localhost', 6333\); print\([m for m in dir\(c\) if 'search' in m.lower\(\) or 'query' in m.lower\(\)]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from qdrant_client import QdrantClient; c = QdrantClient\(url='http://localhost:6333'\); print\([m for m in dir\(c\) if 'search' in m.lower\(\) or 'query' in m.lower\(\)]\)")
